/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libmelfa_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.so -o rosidl_generator_py/melfa_msgs/libmelfa_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.so CMakeFiles/melfa_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/melfa_msgs/srv/_gpio_configure_s.c.o CMakeFiles/melfa_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/melfa_msgs/srv/_mode_configure_s.c.o CMakeFiles/melfa_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/melfa_msgs/msg/_gpio_state_s.c.o CMakeFiles/melfa_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/melfa_msgs/msg/_gpio_command_s.c.o CMakeFiles/melfa_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/melfa_msgs/msg/_controller_type_s.c.o CMakeFiles/melfa_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/melfa_msgs/msg/_control_mode_s.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/rithwik/Desktop/Robotic_Arm_ROS2/rv5as_test_ws/build/melfa_msgs:/opt/ros/humble/lib: /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.10.so libmelfa_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so libmelfa_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
